scripts.install:all: npm install && cd backend && npm install && cd ../frontend && npm install
scripts.dev: concurrently -n BACK,FRONT -c blue,green "cd backend && npm run dev" "cd frontend && npm run dev"
scripts.build: cd backend && npm run build && cd ../frontend && npm run build
scripts.typecheck: cd backend && npm run typecheck && cd ../frontend && npx tsc --noEmit
